title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a lightweight core supporting read, write, edit, and bash operations. Users can extend it with custom plugins installed from npm and git, and it supports multiple open models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6. The framework is positioned as a cost-effective alternative to frontier model rate limits.
